_comment: Reference MCP config for Codefone. wizard.sh registers these via 'claude mcp add' commands at first boot — this file is documentation, not directly consumed by Claude Code. Paths assume Termux layout on Android.

filesystem.description: Read/write files under ~/projects. Scope matches what the agent is allowed to touch.

git.description: Git operations (status, diff, commit, branch) within ~/projects.

github.description: GitHub API (issues, PRs, repo ops). Requires a Personal Access Token stored in ~/.codefone/github-token.

fetch.description: HTTP fetch of arbitrary URLs. Useful for docs lookup.
